Container.Name: scrutiny-collector
Container.Overview: Scrutiny S.M.A.R.T Metrics Collector (Hub/Spoke mode). Collects S.M.A.R.T data from drives and sends it to the Scrutiny web server. Requires a running Scrutiny web server instance. Use the omnibus template instead if you want an all-in-one deployment. You must add each drive as a Device in the container settings. Alternatively, toggle Privileged mode to ON in the Unraid Docker UI to grant access to all drives automatically (less secure).

Config.Name: Udev
Config.Description: Required for device detection. Do not change.

Config.Name: Disk 1
Config.Description: First disk to monitor. Add more Device entries for additional disks. For NVMe, pass both /dev/nvme0 (controller) and /dev/nvme0n1 (namespace).

Config.Name: API Endpoint
Config.Description: Scrutiny web server URL (e.g. http://scrutiny-web:8080). Required.

Config.Name: Host ID
Config.Description: Unique identifier for this collector host. Useful when running multiple collectors.

Config.Name: Cron Schedule
Config.Description: S.M.A.R.T data collection schedule (cron format). Default: daily at midnight.

Config.Name: Run on Startup
Config.Description: Run S.M.A.R.T data collection immediately on container startup.
